news.t: Touchstone Investments Launches Dynamic International ETF to Expand Global Exposure

holdings.infoBox: TDI is an equity ETF with a total of 129 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Touchstone Dynamic International ETF (TDI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in non-US companies from around the globe selected using a proprietary quantitative model. TDI was launched on Dec 8, 2023 and is issued by Touchstone.
